name: PrivHound: Cross-user → writable recovery binary → SYSTEM (credential-discovered)
description: Credential login paths where the discovered user can write a service recovery binary to achieve SYSTEM.
query:
MATCH p=(u:PHUser)-[*1..8]->(t:PHPrivTarget)
WHERE any(r IN relationships(p) WHERE type(r) = "PHCanLoginAs")
  AND any(r IN relationships(p) WHERE type(r) = "PHCanWriteRecoveryBin" AND r.discovered_via = "credential")
RETURN p
